item.title: Oil surges to its highest price since 2023, and stocks drop after U.S. jobs report
item.description: Stocks fell Friday on worries that the economy could become stuck in a worst-case scenario of stagnating growth and high inflation. Oil prices touched...

item.title: No lawsuits required: U.S. Customs is working on a system to refund tariffs
item.description: U.S. Customs told the trade court it aims for a streamlined process in 45 days to return importers' money without requiring individual lawsuits.

item.title: Middle East conflicts largely avoided energy facilities in the past. Not in this war
item.description: Recent conflicts in the region have either spared energy infrastructure or caused limited damage. That isn't the case in the U.S.-Israeli war with Ira...

item.title: Poll: A majority of Americans opposes U.S. military action in Iran
item.description: Most Americans disapprove of President Trump's handling of Iran, and a majority sees Iran as either only a minor threat or no threat at all, an NPR/ P...

item.title: Your Winter Paralympics primer: What, who and how to watch
item.description: Hundreds of para athletes are competing in Italy through March 15. Many Americans are defending past titles, with the U.S. sled hockey team hoping to ...
